meta.desc: AI Menu Growth Engine: Create stunning menu images, auto-generate Thai copy, design QR menus for F&B businesses in Thailand
hero.subtitle: Transform ordinary food photos into professional-grade images with auto-generated Thai copy, QR menus, and social media exports — all in seconds.

features.label: All Features
features.title: Why AI Menu Growth Engine?
features.subtitle: The all-in-one toolkit for Thai F&B businesses — from photo to social media post in minutes.
feat1.title: AI Auto Enhancement
feat1.desc: AI adjusts lighting, color, and sharpness, transforming phone shots into professional-grade images in 5 seconds.
feat2.title: AI Thai Copywriting
feat2.desc: Automatically generate compelling Thai menu descriptions and ad copy that attract more customers.
feat3.title: QR Menu Builder
feat3.desc: Create digital QR menus for customers to scan on their phones — no more printing paper menus.
feat4.title: Social Media Export
feat4.desc: Export images in perfect sizes for Facebook, Instagram, LINE OA, and TikTok — ready to post instantly.
feat5.title: Thai Festival Themes
feat5.desc: Special templates for Songkran, Chinese New Year, and Loy Krathong that make your menu stand out during key moments.
feat6.title: Referral Program
feat6.desc: Refer restaurant peers and earn 20 credits per person — up to 10 referrals (200 credits).

workflow.title: Get started in 4 easy steps
workflow.subtitle: No design skills needed. No software to install. Just upload and let AI do the rest.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, no credit card required. Upgrade when you're ready.
price.free.name: Basic
price.pro.name: Pro
price.growth.name: Growth
pricing.note: * Credits are charged per feature used. Credits don't roll over. Cancel anytime.
referral.title: Refer friends, earn free credits
referral.desc: Refer 1 restaurant peer = earn 20 credits. Max 10 referrals = 200 credits.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Have questions?
faq.a1: Upload food photo (Free) → AI enhances (10 cr) → AI writes copy (Free) → Export/publish (10 cr+). 4 easy steps, no design skills needed.
faq.a2: Credits are per-feature usage units · AI Copywriting: Free · AI Image Generation / Enhancement / Menu Layout: 10 cr each · Social Media Export / Review Poster: 10 cr · Multi-Image Collage: 15 cr · Festival / Delivery Templates: 10 cr
faq.q3: What if I run out of credits?
faq.a3: Wait for monthly free credits per your plan, refer restaurant peers (20 credits each, up to 200), or upgrade your plan.
faq.a4: 100% safe. We don't store your images long-term. Processed and deleted immediately. Enterprise-grade security.
faq.a5: Thai, English, and Chinese for copy, plus other languages. Choose your target audience's language.
faq.a6: Yes, cancel anytime with no penalty. Remaining credits are usable until month end. Pro and Growth don't auto-renew when cancelled.
cta.title: Ready to grow with us?
cta.subtitle: Start free today — no credit card needed. Create stunning menu images in 5 seconds.
cta.note: No credit card · Cancel anytime · TH/EN/ZH supported
